title: Blackboard Context
description: Schema for the blackboard session context state file

current_task.description: The task currently being executed in this session

type.description: Category or type of task (e.g. feature, bugfix, refactor)

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the task was started

status.description: Current execution status of the task

recent_decisions.description: Log of decisions made during this session (capped at 10)

summary.description: Brief description of the decision made

skill.description: The skill that produced this decision

active_constraints.description: List of constraints currently in effect for this session

user_preferences.description: Preferences established or inferred during the session

communication_style.description: Preferred tone and verbosity level (e.g. concise, detailed)

approval_gates.description: Approval gate setting (e.g. always, on_destructive, never)

default_model_profile.description: Model profile to use by default when not overridden

session_metadata.description: Metadata tracking the lifecycle and activity of this session

started_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the session began

last_updated.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the most recent write to this file

conversation_id.description: Identifier for the conversation this session belongs to

messages_count.description: Number of messages exchanged in the session so far

skills_invoked.description: Ordered list of skill names invoked during this session
